title: How to request student access to Adobe Creative Cloud
body: DoIT has a KB article at https://kb.wisc.edu/helpdesk/internal/page.php?id=105526 for instructions on how to request student access (grad student, student worker, or class registration) to Adobe Creative Cloud or Acrobat Pro licenses. Students using the computer labs will NOT need individual license requests since the lab computers use a shared device license. More information on the different types of Adobe licensing is available at https://kb.wisc.edu/helpdesk/internal/page.php?id=78460 . To request an Adobe license for a student employee please fill out the appropriate form on the DoIT KB page . To inquire about Adobe licensing and products, please contact the DoIT Adobe team at adobe@doit.wisc.edu . See Also Adobe Creative Cloud - How Instructors, Student Supervisors, and Faculty Can Provide Student Access for Classes or Campus Jobs Eligibility for Adobe Creative Cloud Licensed By University of Wisconsin System's ETLA
